title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google released DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a novel approach and achieves up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs. The model features a 256-token canvas and self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through a diffusion-based approach rather than standard autoregressive decoding. The shift matters because it reaches up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs, which affects local inference for large language models. Key specifics include a 256-token canvas and built-in self-correction during generation.
